15. Sequence Generative Modeling

15.1. Auto-Regressive

Build diffusion model that can condition on frames. Use teacher forcing, but testtime is OOD.

It works well for language because its discrete so you can try conditioning on vector quantized encoded.

15.2. Full-sequence

Slow (quadratic)

Less OOD

15.3. Diffusion forcing

Sampling: Generally people use transformer to take fixed number of tokens. E.g. Say it’s four. From the first frame generate the next 3 and hold on to only two. This lets you autoregress while the model thinks about the future.

Training: We add varying noise levels. By picking noise levels you can generalize autoregressive + full sequence.

Trying to do binary dropout e.g. training with and without history (analogous to classifier-free guidance) does actually work that well.

15.4. Conditioning

YOu can condition on camera pose but if you go OOD e.g. walking through a wall, you will have an OOD garbage frame in your history and cause your model to diverge

Exceptions to lack of data for action models includes self-driving and video games

Solaris: Building a Multiplayer Video World Model in Minecraft

15.5. Problems

Training a causalvideo generative model is hard
